description: Deterministic latent-variable numerical study; no real image, person, attacker model or hardware measurement is present.

attacker_scores.description: Frozen numerical score distributions calibrated on a subject-disjoint split.

fer_probabilities.description: Frozen normalized class probabilities from a bounded numerical FER response model.

latent_population.description: Bounded latent identity, expression and quality population used only for numerical simulation.
